en: The word that came to Jeremiah from the LORD:
zh: 耶和華有話臨到耶利米，說：

en: "Thus says the LORD, the God of Israel: Write in a book all the words that I have spoken to you.
zh: “耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：‘你要把我對你說過的一切話都寫在書上。

en: For behold, days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will restore the fortunes of my people, Israel and Judah, says the LORD, and I will bring them back to the land that I gave to their fathers, and they shall take possession of it."
zh: 看哪！日子快到 ，我必使我的子民以色列和猶大被擄的人歸回。’耶和華說：‘我必使他們回到我賜給他們列祖之地，他們要重得這地為業。’”

en: These are the words that the LORD spoke concerning Israel and Judah:
zh: 以下是耶和華論到以色列和猶大所說的話：

en: "Thus says the LORD: We have heard a cry of panic, of terror, and no peace.
zh: “耶和華這樣說： ‘我聽見了戰慄喊叫的聲音， 一片恐慌，沒有平安。

en: Ask now, and see, can a man bear a child? Why then do I see every man with his hands on his stomach like a woman in labor? Why has every face turned pale?
zh: 你們去問問，去看看： 男人會生孩子嗎？ 為甚麼我看見所有的壯漢， 都用手抱著腹部，像正在生產的婦人， 每張臉都變成蒼白呢？

en: Alas! That day is so great there is none like it; it is a time of distress for Jacob; yet he shall be saved out of it.
zh: 哀哉！那日大而可畏， 無可比擬； 這是雅各受苦的時期， 但他必被救出來。’”

en: "And it shall come to pass in that day, declares the LORD of hosts, that I will break his yoke from off your neck, and I will burst your bonds, and foreigners shall no more make a servant of him.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華宣告說：‘當那日，我必從他們 的頸項上折斷仇敵的軛，扯斷他們 的繩套；他們必不再作外族人的奴隸。

en: But they shall serve the LORD their God and David their king, whom I will raise up for them.
zh: 他們卻要事奉耶和華他們的 神，和我為他們興起的大衛王。

en: "Then fear not, O Jacob my servant, declares the LORD, nor be dismayed, O Israel; for behold, I will save you from far away, and your offspring from the land of their captivity. Jacob shall return and have quiet and ease, and none shall make him afraid.
zh: 所以，我的僕人雅各啊！你不要懼怕。’ 這是耶和華的宣告。 ‘以色列啊！你不要驚慌。 因為我必拯救你從遠方回來， 必拯救你的後裔脫離他們被擄之地。 雅各必歸回，得享平靜安逸， 沒有人可以使他害怕。

en: For I am with you to save you, declares the LORD; I will make a full end of all the nations among whom I scattered you, but of you I will not make a full end. I will discipline you in just measure, and I will by no means leave you unpunished.
zh: 因為我與你同在， 要拯救你； 我要消滅我趕散你去的列國， 卻必不消滅你。 我要按公正懲治你， 決不能免你受罰。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "For thus says the LORD: Your hurt is incurable, and your wound is grievous.
zh: “耶和華這樣說： ‘你的損傷無法痊愈， 你的創傷不能醫治。

en: There is none to uphold your cause, no medicine for your wound, no healing for you.
zh: 沒有人為你申訴， 你的傷處無藥可救， 你不得醫治。

en: All your lovers have forgotten you; they care nothing for you; for I have dealt you the blow of an enemy, the punishment of a merciless foe, because your guilt is great, because your sins are flagrant.
zh: 你所有的盟友都忘記了你， 不再關心你； 我擊打了你，好像仇敵擊打你， 又好像殘暴的人懲罰你一樣； 都因你的罪孽甚多， 你的罪惡無數。

en: Why do you cry out over your hurt? Your pain is incurable. Because your guilt is great, because your sins are flagrant, I have done these things to you.
zh: 你為甚麼因你的損傷哀叫呢？ 你的病痛無法痊愈。 我這樣對你， 是因你的罪孽甚多， 你的罪惡無數。

en: Therefore all who devour you shall be devoured, and all your foes, every one of them, shall go into captivity; those who plunder you shall be plundered, and all who prey on you I will make a prey.
zh: 但是，吞吃你的，必被吞吃； 你所有的敵人全都要被擄走； 搶掠你的，必成為被搶掠之物； 掠奪你的，我必使他們成為被掠奪之物。

en: For I will restore health to you, and your wounds I will heal, declares the LORD, because they have called you an outcast: 'It is Zion, for whom no one cares!'
zh: 雖然人都說你是被放逐的， 是沒有人關心的錫安； 我卻必使你康復， 醫治你的創傷。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Thus says the LORD: Behold, I will restore the fortunes of the tents of Jacob and have compassion on his dwellings; the city shall be rebuilt on its mound, and the palace shall stand where it used to be.
zh: “耶和華這樣說： ‘看哪！我必復興雅各的帳棚， 也必憐憫他的居所； 城市必在廢墟上重建， 堡壘必立在原來的地點上。

en: Out of them shall come songs of thanksgiving, and the voices of those who celebrate. I will multiply them, and they shall not be few; I will make them honored, and they shall not be small.
zh: 必有感謝的歌聲， 和歡笑的聲音從其中發出來。 我必使他們人數增多，不會減少； 我必使他們得尊榮，不再被人輕看。

en: Their children shall be as they were of old, and their congregation shall be established before me, and I will punish all who oppress them.
zh: 他們的子孫必像以前一樣蒙恩， 他們的國家必在我面前堅立； 我必懲罰所有壓迫他們的人。

en: Their prince shall be one of themselves; their ruler shall come out from their midst; I will make him draw near, and he shall approach me, for who would dare of himself to approach me? declares the LORD.
zh: 他們的元首必是他們自己的人， 他們的統治者必出自他們中間； 我必使他近前來，他也必親近我， 不然，誰敢冒生命的危險來親近我呢？’ 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: And you shall be my people, and I will be your God."
zh: ‘你們要作我的子民， 我要作你們的 神。’”

en: Behold the storm of the LORD! Wrath has gone forth, a whirling tempest; it will burst upon the head of the wicked.
zh: 看哪！耶和華的旋風， 在震怒中發出， 是橫掃的狂風， 必捲到惡人的頭上。

en: The fierce anger of the LORD will not turn back until he has executed and accomplished the intentions of his mind. In the latter days you will understand this.
zh: 耶和華的烈怒必不轉消， 直到他作成和實現他心中的計劃。 在末後的日子， 你們就會明白這事。
